Idioma.LB_Esta_seguro_que_desea_Eliminar_los_Re: ¿Are you sure that desires to eliminate the registrations selected? If you eliminates the registrations selected, will eliminate all the data related to the payroll and you'll have to calculate the payroll again.
Idioma.LB_Seleccione_el_Registro_que_desea_elim: Select the registration that desires to eliminate
Idioma.LB_No_se_pueden_crear_nuevas_relaciones_: New payroll calculation relations can't be created because there is not calendars of definite payment
